user.title: BWT Best Water Home
user.description:
Open the BWT login link in a normal browser, complete login, then paste the final redirected URL or authorization code below.

[BWT login]({auth_url})

After login the browser may show an error because the redirect targets the BWT mobile app URI (`{redirect_uri}`). That is expected; copy the final URL from the address bar if it contains `code=`.

The access token field is kept as a fallback for manually generated tokens.

error.auth: BWT rejected the token. Try the login link again or paste a fresh access token.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the BWT API.
error.missing_auth: Open the BWT login link and paste the redirected URL/code, or paste an access token.
error.oauth: Could not use the pasted redirected URL/code. Make sure it is from this setup attempt and contains code=.
error.no_products: No BWT products were returned for this account.

abort.already_configured: This BWT device is already configured.
